<features>
- main object shape: elongated, boat-like
- main object color: reddish-brown with some darker elements
- background: blue water and lighter sky
- presence of mast/structure: visible vertical structure on the main object
</features>
<kb>
- IF [main object is an animal with four legs AND/OR main object is a horse] THEN [7]
- IF [main object is a vessel on water AND/OR main object has an elongated boat-like shape] THEN [8]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The rule for class 8 fires because the query image clearly shows an elongated, boat-like object on water, which is consistent with the observable features of vessels in the provided examples for class 8.
</rule_check>
<response>8</response>

<features>
- main subject: animal (horse)
- animal color: white/light grey
- animal posture: rearing up on hind legs
- presence of rider: yes
- background: dark, possibly trees or foliage
</features>
<kb>
- IF [main subject is a boat or ship] THEN [8]
- IF [main subject is a horse] THEN [7]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The rule "IF [main subject is a horse] THEN [7]" fires for the Query Image because the main subject is clearly identifiable as a horse, consistent with the examples for class 7.
</rule_check>
<response>7</response>
